response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ development experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile stacks; while there is a brief mention of C++ in a 2014 LabWindows role, it is outdated and not tied to financial systems, and there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated contributions to open-source and community-driven projects
Proven ability to learn and apply diverse technologies across domains
concerns: No recent or demonstrable C++ experience on Windows in financial systems
Lacks explicit fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized with SQL Server or Oracle in enterprise financial systems
